_comment: LIBERO eval results for allenai/MolmoAct2-LIBERO (MolmoAct2). The results block carries the paper-cited LIBERO success rate (reproduced_locally=false); do NOT change reproduced_locally to true without a locally-verified eval run. Re-run via the reproduction_cli command to overwrite with measured numbers.

source.paper: MolmoAct2: Action Reasoning Models for Real-world Deployment
source.reproduction_planned: Requires a CUDA host; ~hours per LIBERO suite. Paper numbers stay until a full repro run lands.

reproduction_cli.description: Re-run this benchmark inside the OpenRAL repo. ADR-0009 PR D: openral benchmark run is the canonical producer of RSkillEvalResult JSONs with reproduced_locally=true.
reproduction_cli.status: in-tree (libero_spatial); MolmoAct2 is ~5.5B params so a full LIBERO sweep needs a GPU host
notes: The 'results' block is the paper snapshot (reproduced_locally=false); re-running the command above and overwriting the file with its output flips that flag.
MolmoAct2 uses flow-matching inference (four flow samples per action chunk); confirm the adaptive-depth reasoning setting matches the paper's eval protocol.
Weights are Apache-2.0 — no non-commercial gate.

benchmark.name: LIBERO
benchmark.protocol: binary success over the LIBERO suites, multi-task training

results.note: 97.2% LIBERO success after post-training (98.1% for the -Think depth-reasoning variant), per the MolmoAct2 paper. Per-suite breakdown not transcribed; reproduce locally to populate spatial/object/goal/long.
